info.name: SWAT API
info.description: SWAT backend — auth, RBAC, and master data. The web flow uses cookie session auth: run Auth → Login first. Native .NET clients use bearer tokens: run Auth → Get Token (native client), which captures accessToken + refreshToken for the Bearer requests. Regenerate with `node apps/backend/postman/generate.mjs`.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Run **Login** first to obtain the session cookie.

request.description: Sets the httpOnly swat.sid cookie. Captures mustChangePassword.
Clears mustChangePassword. Update adminPassword afterwards if you run this.
Issues a temporary password for {{userId}} and forces a change.

exec: pm.test('got tokens', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.equal(200)); const d = pm.response.json().data; pm.environment.set('accessToken', d.accessToken); pm.environment.set('refreshToken', d.refreshToken);

request.description: OAuth2 password grant for the .NET clients. Captures accessToken + refreshToken into the environment. Forced-reset accounts get 403 (change password via web first).

exec: pm.test('rotated', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.equal(200)); const d = pm.response.json().data; pm.environment.set('accessToken', d.accessToken); pm.environment.set('refreshToken', d.refreshToken);

request.description: Rotates the refresh token. Reusing an old/superseded token returns 401 (reuse-detection).
Same principal as the cookie session, authenticated by the bearer token.

exec: if (value !== undefined && value !== null) { pm.environment.set('userId', value); }
if (value !== undefined && value !== null) { pm.environment.set('roleId', value); }
if (value !== undefined && value !== null) { pm.environment.set('roleId', value); }

request.description: Reconciles the permission table against the code catalog (permission:manage). Idempotent; never deletes rows or touches grants.

request.description: Impor Massal — upsert by legacyId; per-row validation. Frontend parses the CSV/Excel and posts structured rows.
